2605.22536.title: SpaceDG: Benchmarking Spatial Intelligence under Visual Degradation
2605.22536.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made rapid progress in spatial intelligence, yet existing spatial reasoning benchmarks largely assume pristine visual inputs and overlook the degradations that commonly occur in real-world deployment, such as motion blur, low light, adverse weather, lens distortion, and compression artifacts. This raises a fundamental question: how robust is the spatial intelligence of current MLLMs when visual observations are imperfect? To answer this question, we introduce SpaceDG, the first large-scale dataset for degradation-aware spatial understanding. It is constructed with a physically grounded degradation synthesis engine that embeds degradation formation process into 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) rendering, enabling realistic simulation of nine degradation types. The resulting dataset contains approximately 1M QA pairs from nearly 1,000 indoor scenes. We further introduce SpaceDG-Bench, an human-verified benchmark with 1,102 questions spanning 11 reasoning categories and 9 visual degradation types, yielding over 10K VQA instances. Evaluating 25 open- and closed-source MLLMs reveals that visual degradations consistently and substantially impair spatial reasoning, exposing a critical robustness gap. Finally, we show that finetuning on SpaceDG markedly improves degradation robustness and can even surpass human performance under degraded conditions without any performance drop on clean images, highlighting the promise of degradation-aware training for robust spatial intelligence.
2605.22536.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在空間智能方面取得了快速進展，但現有的空間推理基準主要假設視覺輸入是完美的，並忽略了在現實世界部署中常見的退化現象，如運動模糊、低光照、不良天氣、鏡頭畸變和壓縮伪影。這引發了一個根本性問題：當視覺觀察不完美時，當前 MLLMs 的空間智能有多強健？為了回答這個問題，我們介紹了 SpaceDG，首個針對退化感知空間理解的大規模數據集。它是通過一個物理基礎的退化合成引擎構建的，該引擎將退化形成過程嵌入到 3D 高斯點雲渲染（3DGS）中，實現了九種退化類型的現實模擬。生成的數據集包含來自近 1,000 個室內場景的約 1M 問答對。我們進一步介紹了 SpaceDG-Bench，這是一個經過人工驗證的基準，包含 1,102 個問題，涵蓋 11 個推理類別和 9 種視覺退化類型，產生了超過 10K 的視覺問答實例。對 25 個開源和閉源 MLLMs 的評估顯示，視覺退化持續且顯著地損害空間推理，暴露出一個關鍵的穩健性差距。最後，我們展示了在 SpaceDG 上進行微調顯著提高了退化穩健性，甚至可以在退化條件下超越人類表現，同時在乾淨圖像上沒有任何性能下降，突顯了針對退化感知訓練在強健空間智能中的潛力。
2605.22536.author: Xiaolong Zhou et.al.
2605.22536.authors: Xiaolong Zhou, Yifei Liu, Ziyang Gong, Jiarui Li, Qiyue Zhao, Muyao Niu, Yuanyuan Gao, Le Ma, Xue Yang, Hongjie Zhang, Zhihang Zhong
